description: Stable reason codes for deterministic audit verification findings, degraded posture, and fail-closed outcomes.

codes.summary: A segment frame record_digest does not match the canonical envelope bytes in that frame.
A segment frame byte_length does not match the decoded canonical envelope byte length.
The exact raw segment-file hash does not match the hash committed by the segment seal.
The ordered Merkle root computed from frame record digests does not match the segment seal commitment.
Segment seal payload or signed envelope verification failed.
Segment seal previous_seal_digest linkage is inconsistent with prior seal digest.
Per-stream sequence monotonicity check found a gap.
Per-stream sequence monotonicity check found a duplicate or rollback.
Per-stream previous_event_hash linkage does not match the prior envelope digest.
Detached signature verification failed for a signed envelope.
An event requires signer evidence but no admissible referenced evidence was provided.
Signer evidence payload is malformed or violates admissibility rules.
Signer status/evidence was not admissible at the signed event time.
Signer was historically admissible but is now revoked or compromised, producing degraded current posture.
Audit event payload does not satisfy the active event-contract catalog entry.
No event-contract catalog entry exists for an observed audit_event_type.
Import/restore receipt provenance links are inconsistent with local segment seal or hash evidence.
Audit receipt payload or signed envelope verification failed.
No anchor receipt is present for at least one sealed segment in scope.
An anchor receipt is present but invalid, requiring fail-closed verification.
Anchor receipt used passphrase presence posture, which remains explicitly allowed but degraded versus os_confirmation/hardware_touch.
External anchor evidence validated for at least one target and contributed explicit anchoring confirmation.
External anchor evidence indicates deferred/unavailable posture for required target coverage.
External anchor evidence is invalid for required anchoring target coverage and fails closed.
Required approval evidence linkage is missing for observed authorization or production-affecting mutation evidence.
Runtime event posture indicates attested operation but required attestation evidence is absent.
Runtime summary evidence exists but explicit negative-capability summary evidence is missing.
Negative-capability summary evidence exists but one or more absence-claim support lanes are limited or unknown instead of explicit.
Verification inputs did not provide sufficient verifier identity/trust-root material for explicit identity attribution.
Evidence export completeness could not be established from canonical export evidence receipts.
Segment lifecycle posture is inconsistent with segment header, lifecycle marker, seal state, or receipts.
Storage posture evidence indicates explicit degraded protection posture.
Storage posture evidence is invalid and fails verification closed.
